utility_evaluation.REASONING:

That makes 5 total items. Now check the final coverage plan: 
- health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health, each with plan names, monthly costs, features — fully specified with costs. ✓
- property_coverage: has plan name, monthly cost, coverage description — fully specified. ✓
- travel_coverage: has plan name, monthly cost, coverage description — fully specified. ✓
- additional_services: contains two add-ons, each with name, monthly cost, and description — fully specified. ✓
- total_budget: includes monthly cost, annual cost, monthly savings, annual savings — fully specified. ✓
All 5 required items are present and fully specified.
